title: Enchantable ShulkerBox
description: This mod adds an enchantment that can be applied to the shulker box.
body:
# Enchantable Shulker Box Mod

The **Enchantable Shulker Box Mod** introduces an exciting new feature to your Minecraft world: the ability to enchant Shulker Boxes! This mod enhances the functionality of Shulker Boxes by allowing players to imbue them with powerful enchantments, starting with the **Refill** enchantment.

## Features

### 🪄 Enchantable Shulker Boxes
- Shulker Boxes can now be enchanted like regular tools and weapons.
- Enchant them through the Enchantment Table or combine enchantments with Anvils.

### ⚡ Refill Enchantment
- The **Refill** enchantment is a utility enchantment for players who love efficiency and organization.
- When you use an item (e.g., arrows, potions, or blocks) and your inventory runs out, the enchanted Shulker Box will automatically refill your inventory from its stored items.
- Perfect for builders, adventurers, and combat enthusiasts who rely on keeping their inventory well-stocked.

### 🔄 Seamless Integration
- Enchanted Shulker Boxes retain their enchantments even when broken and placed again, ensuring you never lose your enhancements.
- Fully compatible with existing enchantment mechanics, including Anvils and the Grindstone.

## Compatibility
- Works seamlessly in both single-player and multiplayer environments.
- Designed to integrate with other mods, maintaining a vanilla-friendly experience.

## Notes
- This mod currently focuses on the **Refill** enchantment but is designed to be expanded with more enchantments in the future.
- Please report any bugs or suggestions on the [issue tracker](#).

Take your storage and utility game to the next level with the **Enchantable Shulker Box Mod**!
